message:
test(umask,procinfo): add 7+13 tests for umask saver and process info (wa-282k6, wa-11h61)

umask: 7 tests covering UmaskSaver new/default/drop restore, saved_umask
Some/None lifecycle, and nested saver correctness.

procinfo: 13 tests covering LocalProcessStatus variants, LocalProcessInfo
construction/clone/debug, flatten_to_exe_names with children/dedup/empty,
and live process queries (with_root_pid, current_working_dir, executable_path).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
